title: packera obovata
intro: Packera obovata, also known as golden ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. Consuming the plant is said to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Packera obovata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
